_comment: NPC: Bone Merchant Gui (骨商鬼). INFERRED: Ancient Demon City. Derivation: I = INFERRED.
name: Bone Merchant Gui
personality: sinister, trades in bone tools and dark materials

perception_tiers.mortal: A merchant of Ancient Demon City
perception_tiers.qi_condensation: Bone Merchant Gui, Ancient Demon merchant

note: INFERRED: Ancient Demon City merchant. sinister, trades in bone tools and dark materials.
initiation_lines: Welcome to the only market in Zhao where bones are worth more than gold. Spirit beast bones, ancient creature remains  -  I deal in them all.
The merchants in Qilin City sell live beasts. I sell what remains after. There is more profit in death than life, sadly.
Obsidian, ink, bones  -  bring me dark materials and I will pay fairly. The temple always needs supplies for their... rituals.
A cultivator from the Corpse Yin Sect visited last month. Bought twelve bags of bone powder. I did not ask what it was for.

sect_tasks.description: Gui: 'I process bones into tools and powder. Bring me raw bones and ink  -  the temple pays well for bone powder.'
Gui: 'Obsidian is rare and valuable. If you find any in the wild, bring it to me. Coal for the forge too.'
